title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates!
